vulnerability.reference: Platforms lack built-in attribution mechanisms, making tracing of copyrighted sources impossible.
vulnerability.generated: Reliance on visual auditing tools that fail to detect disguised training data influences.

impact.reference: Undetected infringement persists, eroding trust between creators and platforms.
impact.generated: Undetected copyright infringement proliferates, causing legal, financial, and reputational harm to platform operators and users.

dose_response.reference: On AI platforms lacking attribution mechanisms, diffusion models' subtle replication reduces detectability, exposing platform operators and end-users to persistent undetected infringement and accumulated legal risks, as tracking is impossible and reliance on good faith prevails.
dose_response.generated: When diffusion models subtly replicate copyrighted content, platform operators and end-users deploying them rely on visual auditing tools that fail to detect disguised influences, leading to undetected copyright infringement proliferating, causing legal, financial, and reputational harm.
